hero.description: We build data platforms and semantic foundations so analytics and AI agents work reliably. Scalable, secure, and value-driven.

problem.title: Your data isn't AI-ready?
problem.description: Enterprises fail at AI initiatives not because of missing algorithms, but because of fragmented, unclean data. We bridge the gap between raw data and intelligent agents.

services_page.hero_desc: From data strategy to production AI solutions –we guide you every step of the way.

about_page.hero_desc: We're not a consulting factory. We're a team of experienced architects and engineers who'd rather build than present.
about_page.story_p1: HackLab was founded with a clear conviction: enterprises don't need more PowerPoint slides –they need working data platforms.
about_page.story_p2: We combine deep technical understanding with strategic thinking. Short decision paths, senior expertise from day one, and real engineering depth instead of consultant rotation.
about_page.founder_desc: 20 years at Microsoft, then advisor and architect for EY, Schaeffler, and Microsoft Corp. Today he builds data-driven solutions on Microsoft Fabric, SAP integration, and AI with HackLab.
about_page.step1_desc: Analysis of the existing data landscape and definition of use cases with the highest business impact.
about_page.step2_desc: Rapid validation of concepts through a Minimum Viable Data Product within 4 weeks.
about_page.step3_desc: Scaling the solution into the enterprise landscape with focus on security, CI/CD, and data quality.
about_page.value1_desc: Every solution starts with a solid architectural foundation. We think in systems, not in isolated projects.
about_page.value2_desc: We measure success by measurable business impact, not by the number of delivered documents.
about_page.value3_desc: We work at eye level with your teams and transfer knowledge instead of creating dependencies.

contact_page.hero_desc: Tell us about your project –we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

impressum_page.title: Legal Notice
impressum_page.name: Stefan Kummert
impressum_page.liability_text: The contents of our pages were created with the greatest care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, and timeliness of the content.
impressum_page.links_text: Our website contains links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no influence. Therefore, we cannot accept any liability for this external content.

datenschutz_page.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz_page.intro: The protection of your personal data is of particular concern to us. We process your data exclusively on the basis of legal regulations (GDPR, TKG 2003).
datenschutz_page.responsible_text:
HackLab GmbH
Stefan Kummert
Grafing near Munich, Germany
hello@hacklab.de
datenschutz_page.collection_title: 2. Collection and Storage of Personal Data
datenschutz_page.collection_text: When visiting our website, information is automatically sent to our server. This information is temporarily stored in a log file. The following information is collected without your intervention and stored until automatic deletion: IP address, date and time of access, name and URL of the retrieved file, referrer URL, browser used, and your operating system.
datenschutz_page.contact_text: If you send us inquiries via the contact form, your details from the inquiry form, including the contact data you provided, will be stored by us for the purpose of processing the inquiry and for follow-up questions. We do not share this data without your consent.
datenschutz_page.rights_text: You have the right at any time to free information about your stored personal data, its origin and recipients, and the purpose of data processing, as well as a right to correction, blocking, or deletion of this data.
datenschutz_page.cookies_text: This website does not use tracking cookies. Only technically necessary cookies are used.
datenschutz_page.hosting_text: This website is hosted on GitHub Pages. The provider is GitHub Inc., 88 Colin P Kelly Jr St, San Francisco, CA 94107, USA. For more information about privacy at GitHub, visit: https://docs.github.com/en/site-policy/privacy-policies/github-general-privacy-statement
